history.text: What's the story with the Lakers this season?

The Lakers are navigating a challenging season defined by significant roster turnover and a prolonged playoff drought following their championship run years ago. The team built around Anthony Davis and LeBron James struggled with consistency, often falling victim to defensive lapses and injuries that plagued key players throughout the campaign. As they look toward the future, the organization is heavily focused on the upcoming offseason, with expectations that they will make major moves to rebuild a competitive roster capable of returning to contention in the near term.
